XOnlineQueryUpdateId

Advanced update function that enables the title to invoke a specific query that updates entities (rows) in the dataset. 

HRESULT XOnlineQueryUpdateId(
    DWORD dwUserIndex,
    ULONGLONG qwTeamId,
    DWORD dwDatasetId,
    DWORD dwProcIndex,
    XENTITY_ID entityId,
    DWORD dwNumAttributes,
    const XONLINE_ATTRIBUTE *pAttributes,
    HANDLE hWorkEvent,
    PXONLINETASK_HANDLE *phTask
);

Parameters

dwUserIndex
[in] Controller index (zero-based) of the player. The player must have been successfully logged on with a previous call to XOnlineLogon.
qwTeamId
[in] Team ID. Used only if the entity to be updated is associated with a team. Otherwise, set this value to 0.
dwDatasetId
[in] ID of the dataset to query.
dwProcIndex
[in] Index number of an update ID.
entityId
[in] Entity ID obtained from XOnlineQueryAddGetResults.
dwNumAttributes
[in] Number of attributes in the array specified by the pAttributes parameter.
pAttributes
[in] Array of XONLINE_ATTRIBUTE structures containing the ID and value of parameters to the UpdateID query.
hWorkEvent
[in, optional] Handle to an event you want to associate with this task. If you do not want to assign an event, set this parameter to NULL.
phTask
[out] Pointer to an XONLINETASK_HANDLE type. The handle is associated with the task started by XOnlineQueryUpdate.

Return Values

Returns S_OK if successful, an error code otherwise. The error codes can include those listed in the following table.

Error Code Description
XONLINE_E_QUERY_ENTITY_NOT_FOUND The entity ID specified in the entityId parameter was not found.
XONLINE_E_QUERY_UNEXPECTED_ATTRIBUTE An attributes was included in the array pointed to by the pAttributes parameter that does not have a corresponding parameter in the remove query.
XONLINE_E_QUERY_DATASET_NOT_FOUND The specified dataset ID was not found.
XONLINE_E_QUERY_PROCEDURE_NOT_FOUND The specified procedure index was not found.
XONLINE_E_QUERY_PERMISSION_DENIED No entities were found that matched the provided attributes and were owned by the given player or team ID; however, entities were found that matched the provided attributes and were not owned by the given player or team ID.

Remarks

The query generated by this function selects the search attributes and the update attributes. This function is not required for single-elimination or multilevel competitions. It does not have a corresponding wrapper function in the XonlineCompetition API.

Entities can be updated only by the same player or team that originally added them.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib.

See Also

XOnlineQueryAddGetResults
